title: Middle Java Developer
description: The e-learning market has experienced significant expansion in recent years, fueled by advancements in technology, the beginning of the Fourth Industrial Revolution, increasing internet penetration, and a growing demand for quality, accessible education. This trend is expected to continue and VERTEX is looking for an experienced Medior Java Developer for a chain of e-learning domain projects serving millions of learners providing affordable, quality digital products and services that equip students with the skills and competencies needed to be job-ready. ABOUT THE PROJECTS We are looking for a highly skilled java engineer to work with our team to help provide technical expertise in the design, delivery and maintenance of integrations and solutions of one of the biggest e-learning companies in the world. Extensive knowledge and experience with the broad range of technologies used in integrating systems and solutions, along with a good grasp of architectural concepts, are essential to the effectiveness of this position. Additionally, the ability to communicate clearly and effectively and to coordinate, guide and influence multiple teams to reach an agreement is fundamental to this position. On our team, you’ll find streamlined fully Agile processes, a friendly international team of professionals, space for personal development, and the ability to implement innovative solutions for users from all over the world using an advanced technology stack. RESPONSIBILITIES: Ability to independently perform any typical project task, diagnose and fix functional problems, and identify workarounds without or with minimal technical guidance Ability to perform critical tasks with higher complexity, diagnose complex problems including non-functional problems such as performance or integration issues, identify workarounds, and drive resolution. Ability to "own" the problem. Ability to communicate outside of the engineering team: product management, engineering management, dev ops, tech support, etc Ability to provide tech guidance and mentoring to less experienced team members, enforce good coding practices though code reviews and mentoring. Initiate/drive process improvement and drive adoption of "best practices" across design, construction, test, etc. Understanding of issues in a complex system, e.g. performance, data integrity, security, capacity Develop technical designs, perform decompositions, evaluate tasks Be responsible for code delivery and maintenance up to production Participate in all Scrum ceremonies Participate in code and technical design reviews of other developers Write and maintain project documentation WHAT WE OFFER: Long-term career stability with a competitive salary paid in USD. Conditions for steady career development. Development supported by dedicated mentors and a variety of programs focused on expertise and innovation. Private medical insurance provided after successful completion of the probationary period A well-equipped and cozy office supports comfort and productivity across all project stages. Welcoming atmosphere and a friendly corporate culture.
requirements: MINIMUM QUALIFICATION: 2+ years of Java development experience Experience with Spring Ecosystem Experience with monitoring and metrics tools (Dynatrace, Splunk, CloudWatch) Experience with RESTful API and messaging design and development Experience with relational and NoSQL databases Work with bug tracking systems (JIRA) Understanding of Agile and Scrum processes PREFERRED QUALIFICATION: Experience with ReactJS, JS/TS Experience with CI/CD tools and processes (Jenkins, Cloud Foundry, SplitIO, etc) Knowledge of integration development practices, architectures, concepts and technologies (API led, Event Driven, REST, JSON, SOAP, XML, RAML, OAS, JMS, etc.) Knowledge of AWS (ALB, EC2, CloudFront, S3, SQS, RDS Aurora, SES, WAF) Knowledge of Kubernetes, Docker container orchestrator Knowledge of OWASP, Oauth2, SAML, Okta Verify, Vault or other security items Knowledge of Apache Tomcat, Apache HTTP Server

title: Senior Odoo Implementer
employment_type: Freelance / Project, Hybrid, SMART ICON EG
description: Are you a seasoned Odoo Implementer ready to take your career to the next level? We're seeking a highly motivated and experienced Senior Odoo Implementer to join our dynamic team. This is an exciting opportunity to lead and contribute to impactful ERP implementations in Cairo, Egypt, with a hybrid work arrangement. Overview: As a Senior Odoo Implementer, you will play a crucial role in the full lifecycle of Odoo ERP implementations. From initial consultation and requirements gathering to system configuration, testing, training, and go-live support, you will be at the forefront of driving successful project outcomes. Responsibilities: Lead and manage Odoo implementation projects from inception to completion. Gather and analyze client requirements to design tailored Odoo solutions. title: Senior Android Developer
description: We are looking for an experienced Android developer responsible for the development and maintenance of applications aimed at a vast number of diverse Android devices. Your primary focus will be the development of Android applications, their integration with back-end and AI-powered services, and efficient network communication. You will be working alongside other engineers and developers across different layers of the infrastructure. A strong commitment to collaborative problem-solving, sophisticated design, and creating high-quality products is essential. Responsibilities: Design and develop advanced Android applications for various devices and screen sizes. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features — including AI-driven functionalities and real-time networked components. Optimize network usage and ensure secure, efficient communication with remote services via REST, GraphQL, or WebSockets. Integrate machine learning models and AI APIs into Android apps for enhanced user experiences (e.g., personalization, smart predictions, computer vision). Work on bug fixing and improving application performance, especially around networking and asynchronous operations. Continuously discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies — including AI/ML tools and network optimization techniques — to maximize development efficiency. Mentor and provide technical guidance to junior developers. Participate in code reviews and ensure code quality and best practices. Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends in Android, mobile networking, and AI integration.
requirements: Job Requirements Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field. 5+ years of experience in Android development with a strong portfolio of published apps. Proficient in Java and Kotlin programming languages. Experience with Android SDK, Android Studio, and related development tools. Solid understanding of Android UI/UX design principles, patterns, and best practices. Strong experience working with RESTful APIs, JSON, GraphQL, and modern networking libraries (e.g., OkHttp, Retrofit). Familiarity with on-device machine learning (ML Kit, TensorFlow Lite) or cloud-based AI services (Firebase ML, OpenAI APIs, Google Cloud AI). Knowledge of best practices for network security, caching, and background data sync. Experience with multithreading, RxJava, Kotlin Coroutines, and asynchronous network operations. Strong analytical and debugging skills. Excellent communication and collaboration abilities. Proficiency with Git or other version control systems. Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks is a plus. Benefits: Competitive salary Social Insurance without Any deduction from the Salary Medical Insurance without Any deduction from the Salary 5 working days & 8 daily Hours including 1 hour Break Gaming area Continues training.

title: Product Manager
description: Summary: The Product Manager will be responsible for owning the product vision, strategy, and roadmap while ensuring successful execution through close collaboration with cross-functional teams. The role bridges business, technology, and customer needs, translating strategic objectives into prioritized product initiatives that deliver measurable value. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or Business Analyst and is comfortable operating across discovery, delivery, and optimization phases. They will work closely with stakeholders, customers, and development teams to define product direction, prioritize initiatives, and ensure timely, high-quality delivery aligned with business goals. Roles & Responsibilities: Product Strategy & Vision Define and communicate a clear product vision aligned with business strategy and customer needs. Own and maintain the product roadmap, ensuring alignment with organizational priorities and market demands. Continuously evaluate product performance and identify opportunities for improvement, optimization, or innovation. Balance short-term delivery needs with long-term product strategy. Stakeholder & Customer Management Act as the primary point of contact between business stakeholders, customers, and delivery teams. Gather, analyze, and validate requirements from business users and stakeholders. Understand and prioritize end-user needs, preferences, and pain points. Ensure stakeholder expectations are aligned with product scope, timelines, and outcomes. Conduct internal product review sessions to assess progress and manage expectations. Backlog & Requirements Management Own and continuously refine the product backlog to maximize business value. Translate business and customer needs into clear, concise, and actionable user stories. Break down complex requirements into manageable features and user stories. Define, document, and validate acceptance criteria for user stories and features. Establish and maintain business acceptance criteria in collaboration with stakeholders. Prioritize backlog items based on business value, risk, dependencies, and strategic goals. Agile Delivery & Execution Work closely with Scrum/Kanban teams to ensure effective planning, execution, and delivery. Participate in sprint planning, backlog grooming, reviews, and retrospectives. Evaluate product progress at each iteration and provide insights for continuous improvement. Provide timely and clear feedback to development teams to ensure alignment with product objectives. Validate the Definition of Done for user stories, iterations, and releases. Support release planning and oversee iteration and release schedules. Metrics, Reporting & Continuous Improvement Monitor delivery performance using metrics such as velocity, burndown/burnup, and throughput. Track iteration progress and ensure transparency across teams and stakeholders. Ensure customer feedback is captured, categorized, and translated into actionable backlog items. Promote Agile best practices and a culture of continuous improvement and learning. Support teams in improving processes, quality, and delivery efficiency.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (preferred). 3 to 6 years of experience as a Product Manager, Product Owner, or Business Analyst. Strong understanding of Agile methodologies, particularly Scrum and Kanban. Proven experience with user stories, acceptance criteria, and backlog management. Familiarity with modern software development practices, including CI/CD, automated testing, and TDD concepts. Solid understanding of software development lifecycles and service-oriented architectures. Experience using metrics to drive product decisions and incremental delivery. Knowledge of backlog tracking, velocity, burndown/burnup charts, and capacity planning. Strong communication, stakeholder management, and decision-making skills. Ability to take ownership, manage priorities, and deliver products within agreed timelines.

If you thrive on building robust, scalable, and high-performance backend systems, your next adventure starts here! title: Product Owner
employment_type: Full Time, Hybrid, Ibn Sina Pharma
description: Are you a visionary who thrives at the intersection of technology and business? Do you possess an innate ability to translate complex ideas into tangible product features? Join our dynamic team in Cairo, Egypt , where you'll be at the forefront of innovation, shaping the future of our digital solutions! We are seeking an exceptional Product Owner to drive the evolution of our cutting-edge software products. Overview: As a Product Owner, you will be the strategic link between our business objectives and our development teams. You will articulate the product vision, manage the backlog, and ensure that every sprint delivers maximum value to our customers. This hybrid role offers the flexibility to collaborate both remotely and from our vibrant Cairo office, fostering a collaborative and energetic environment. Responsibilities: Define and champion the product vision and strategy, aligning with company goals and market demands. Own, prioritize, and manage the product backlog, ensuring a clear and concise set of user stories and requirements. Collaborate closely with stakeholders across business development, marketing, and engineering to gather insights and drive consensus. Translate business needs into detailed functional specifications and acceptance criteria for the development team. Facilitate Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, sprint reviews, and retrospectives. Monitor and analyze product performance, user feedback, and market trends to identify opportunities for improvement and innovation. Ensure timely delivery of high-quality products that meet user expectations and business objectives. Skills & Technologies: You will leverage your expertise in Product Management , Agile Methodologies , and Software Development . A strong foundation in Computer Science and Information Technology (IT) will be invaluable as you navigate technical discussions and drive product decisions. Your proficiency in Stakeholder Management and Requirements Gathering will be critical to your success. Growth Opportunities: We are committed to your professional development. You'll have opportunities to lead impactful projects, expand your technical and strategic skill set, and contribute to a rapidly growing company. Mentorship and continuous learning are cornerstones of our culture, offering clear pathways for advancement into senior product roles. Team & Culture: Our culture is built on innovation, collaboration, and mutual respect. We are a diverse team of passionate professionals who believe in empowering individuals and celebrating collective achievements. We foster an environment where your ideas are valued, and your contributions make a real difference. Impact: Your work as a Product Owner will directly influence the success and direction of our flagship products. You will be instrumental in delivering solutions that not only meet but exceed customer expectations, driving significant business growth and market impact in the region and beyond.
requirements: Experience Level: We are looking for an Experienced professional with 1-3 years of demonstrable experience in product management or a similar role within software development. Required Skills: Proven track record in Product Management and driving product lifecycles. Solid understanding and practical experience with Agile Methodologies (Scrum, Kanban). Strong background in Software Development principles and practices. Excellent command of Computer Science and Information Technology (IT) fundamentals. Exceptional abilities in Stakeholder Management and cross-functional collaboration. Proficiency in Requirements Gathering , documentation, and managing product backlogs. Experience with User Story Mapping and writing clear, actionable user stories. Demonstrated skills in Business Analysis and translating market needs into product features. Outstanding Communication (written and verbal) and presentation skills. Familiarity with Data Analysis to inform product decisions and measure success. Career Level Expectations: Candidates should demonstrate the ability to independently manage product features, take ownership of specific product areas, and contribute strategically to the product roadmap.
